name: Lasagna Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red bell pepper, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
1 medium green bell pepper, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook and drain noodles as directed on package.
3. Prepare béchamel sauce:
a. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
b. Whisk together milk, flour, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
c. Gradually stir the mixture into the melted butter, stirring constantly until boiling.
d. Continue to boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat. Stir in butter-flavored sprinkles if desired.
4. In a large bowl, mix broccoli, carrots, tomatoes, and bell peppers.
5. In a separate bowl, combine ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, and egg.
6. Assemble the lasagna:
a. Spread 1 cup of sauce in an ungreased rectangular pan (13X9X2 inches).
b. Arrange 4 noodles on top of the sauce.
c. Spread half of the cheese mixture over the noodles.
d. Add one-third of the vegetable mixture and 1 cup of sauce.
e. Sprinkle with 1 cup of mozzarella cheese.
f. Repeat steps a-e with remaining ingredients, ending with the remaining noodles covered in sauce and mozzarella.
7. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
8. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
9. Let stand for 15 minutes before cutting.
8 Servings
